text: The app keeps crashing every time I try to upload a photo. Really frustrating, been happening for 2 weeks now.
Love the new dark mode! But checkout is way too slow, took 45 seconds to process my payment.
Customer support was amazing, resolved my issue in 5 minutes.
Cannot log in after resetting my password. This is the third time this month.
Great UI redesign, much cleaner than before.
My order was delayed by 5 days with no notification. Very disappointed.
Would love to see a dark mode option and better notification controls.
App is fast and reliable, no complaints.
Payment failed twice but money was deducted both times. Need urgent refund.
The search feature is broken, returns irrelevant results most of the time.
Really appreciate how quickly the team fixed my billing issue.
App crashes on startup after the latest update. Unusable right now.
Checkout process is confusing, took me three tries to complete an order.
Delivery was on time and packaging was great.
Notifications are too frequent, please add a way to customize them.
